newsapi.title: Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos - The Verge

bbc.title: US launches more strikes on Iran with blasts reported in south of country
bbc.description: Trump says the attacks are "retribution for yesterday's bombing of ships by Iran". Iran earlier promised strong retaliation.

bbc.title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
bbc.description: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

bbc.title: Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says
bbc.description: Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times.

bbc.title: German doctor jailed for murder of 15 patients and suspected of more
bbc.description: The German palliative care doctor has been sentenced to life imprisonment for killing 15 of his patients.

bbc.title: Teenager arrested after two girls, 13, seriously injured in German school attack
bbc.description: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.

bbc.title: Arizona toddler found alive in hospital morgue after declared dead from drowning
bbc.description: After he was discovered to still be alive, the 18-month-old was flown to another hospital and survived.

bbc.title: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
bbc.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.

bbc.title: Eight killed after landslide hits girls' school in Bangladesh
bbc.description: Rescuers pull bodies from the mud after heavy monsoon rains batter the south-eastern coast.

bbc.title: Why electric cars cost more to insure - and what's being done about it
bbc.description: The insurance cost of electric vehicles is still putting many would-be buyers. So what can be done about it?

bbc.title: I run the UK's biggest bank, here are five ways to manage your money
bbc.description: The CEO of Lloyds Bank talks about how to save, budget, avoid scams and manage money in a relationship.

bbc.title: Virgin Media fined after hanging up on customers trying to cancel contracts

bbc.title: Hundreds of jobs at risk as John Lewis plans to cut some services
bbc.description: No final decision has been made but the job cuts will happen in the autumn if the redundancy plans are approved.
